title: Chemistry of Mixed Ligand Complexes of Copper(II) involving Ketoanil and Thiourea, Ammonia or Anionic Ligands
author: R. K. UPADHYAY
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry. N R. E C. College, Khurja-203 131 

  Manuscript received 5 September 1994, revised 31 January 1996, accepted 14 May 1996  

 Mixed ligand complexes of Cu II  involving thiophene-2-glyoxal-2-mercaptyl-, -2-pyridine- or -2-pyrimidine-anil and thiourea, ammonia or anionic ligands, obtained either by direct reaction or by partial or complete replacement of strongly coordinated ammonia of cupric ammine complex, have been synthesised and characterised.
steps_raw:
